lines.speaker: Fiora
lines.text: Ahoy there! Here for a drink? You've picked the right place for it. Steve is thankfully a much better bartender than he was a sailor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds like there's a story here?

lines.speaker: Fiora
lines.text: Indeed there is. Steve fancied himself a pirate, but on his first proper voyage he managed to crash his ship, the Pandemonium, right here.

lines.speaker: Fiora
lines.text: He claims it was an unavoidable accident caused by the Storm Tempor, but I heard it was actually because he got distracted by a large flock of angry parrots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So he crashed the boat and then decided to open a bar?
